title: Velmir — the Shadow Sword
bodyText:
[[the-assassin|The horned assassin]]'s shadowed blade, taken in S13 (used by [[pc-varen|Varen]] to dismember its former owner). Was **cursed**; **[[eira-cavernborn|Eira]] lifted the curse** (S15). Now carried by **[[pc-eddy|Eddy]]**. Named "Velmir" in the prep notes; magical, largely unexplored.

> [!dm] Unwritten: what it actually does, and what a weapon forged for [[lolth]]'s hunter thinks of serving a light-bearer.
